/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libopen_cyber_glove_ros2__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libopen_cyber_glove_ros2__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/open_cyber_glove_ros2__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/open_cyber_glove_ros2/msg/detail/glove_data_msg__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
